title: Lint Executor
description: A type definition for the Powerlines - Lint executor schema

config.title: Powerlines Configuration File
config.description: The path to the Powerlines configuration file. Alias for `configFile`.

configFile.title: Powerlines Configuration File
configFile.description: The path to the Powerlines configuration file. Alias for `config`.

input.title: Input Entry File(s)
input.description: The entry file(s) that serve as the input for the project

tsconfig.title: TSConfig Path
tsconfig.description: The path to the tsconfig file

outputPath.title: Output Path
outputPath.description: The path to the output directory for the build artifacts

copyPath.title: Copy Path
copyPath.description: A directory path to copy the build artifacts into

noExternal.title: No External
noExternal.description: The dependencies that should not be treated as external

skipNodeModulesBundle.title: Skip Node Modules Bundle
skipNodeModulesBundle.description: Skip bundling node_modules during the build process (if required)

logLevel.title: Log Level
logLevel.description: The log level to use for the build process

assets.title: Assets
assets.tsType: Array<{ input?: string; output?: string; glob: string; ignore?: string[]; dot?: boolean; }>

additionalArgs.title: Additional Arguments
additionalArgs.description: The additional arguments provided during execution of the command

autoInstall.title: Auto Install
autoInstall.description: Automatically install dependencies during prepare stage

skipCache.title: Skip Cache
skipCache.description: Skip the caching mechanism during the build process (if required)
